description.zh: Subagent / Teammate / Swarm 三层 Agent 协作模型
description.en: 3-layer Agent collaboration model: Subagent / Teammate / Swarm

content.zh: 重构整个认证模块，包括代码、测试和文档
content.en: Refactor entire auth module, including code, tests, and docs

annotation.zh: 超出单 Agent 能力的大型任务
annotation.en: Large task beyond single Agent capability

content.zh:
Main Agent 分析任务:
  → 需要并行处理 3 个子任务
  → 选择 Subagent 模式
content.en:
Main Agent analyzes task:
  → Need to process 3 subtasks in parallel
  → Choose Subagent mode

annotation.zh: Main Agent 决定分发子任务
annotation.en: Main Agent decides to dispatch subtasks

annotation.zh: Subagent: 隔离的 messages[] 不污染主对话
annotation.en: Subagent: Isolated messages[] doesn't pollute main conversation

content.zh:
依赖分析完成:
  auth.ts → session.ts → db.ts
  共 5 个关联文件
content.en:
Dependency analysis complete:
  auth.ts → session.ts → db.ts
  Total 5 related files

annotation.zh: Subagent 结果摘要返回 Main
annotation.en: Subagent result summary returned to Main

content.zh:
任务升级为 Teammate 模式:
  Teammate A: 重写 auth.ts + session.ts
  Teammate B: 更新所有测试文件
  通信: 文件邮箱 /tmp/mailbox-*
content.en:
Task upgraded to Teammate mode:
  Teammate A: Rewrite auth.ts + session.ts
  Teammate B: Update all test files
  Communication: File mailbox /tmp/mailbox-*

annotation.zh: 持久化队友，各自独立运行

content.zh:
邮箱通信:
  A → mailbox: '重写完成，接口变更: login(email, hash)'
  B 读取邮箱 → 更新测试用例
  B → mailbox: '15 个测试更新完成'
content.en:
Mailbox communication:
  A → mailbox: 'Rewrite done, interface change: login(email, hash)'
  B reads mailbox → Update test cases
  B → mailbox: '15 tests updated'

annotation.zh: Teammate 通过异步邮箱协调

content.zh:
认证模块重构完成！
- 重写了 auth.ts 和 session.ts
- 更新了 15 个测试用例
- 所有测试通过 ✓
content.en:
Auth module refactor complete!
- Rewrote auth.ts and session.ts
- Updated 15 test cases
- All tests passed ✓

annotation.zh: 多 Agent 协作完成复杂任务
